element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used throughout for long jumps, fall survival, and updraft utilization
Core mechanic refined across all levels with varied enemy types
Essential for precision targeting and airstrike selection
Standard explosive weapon across all levels
Requires sniper mode activation; limited to exterior locations

element_introduction_order.element: Smart bomb - World's Most Interesting Bomb
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tactical weapon; attracts enemies before detonation
Area-damage weapon with ground vibration effect
Puzzle mechanic for opening locked doors
Rudimentary puzzles integrated into Minecrawler infiltration
Unique strategy required per pilot; each Minecrawler's pilot requires different approach
Vehicle-based gameplay variant; bombing runs on enemy positions
Navigation-focused minigame to reach specific locations
Health power-up collection; penalty for touching walls; time-limited

typical_tension_triggers: Enemy encounters in confined interior spaces
Time pressure in energy stream chase
Wall collision damage in energy stream
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity within each level; distinctive minigame variety breaks tension between infiltration sequences; energy stream finale provides climactic relief cycle

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Health power-up collection in energy stream post-level; minigame branching (bombing ship, glider, snowboarding) suggests alternate spatial paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (ribbon chute, run-and-gun, sniper mode) with moderate combat pressure; atmospheric entry teaches radar avoidance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variety expands; puzzle complexity increases; minigame integration adds varied challenge types; enemy types diversify per Minecrawler aesthetic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Each pilot requires distinct elimination strategy; culminating Minecrawler encounters escalate in difficulty; energy stream collection becomes high-stakes finale
notable_spikes: Boss fight difficulty spike (each pilot has unique strategy requirement)
Minecrawler radar activation during descent (mechanical skill check)
Energy stream wall collision penalties (precision/timing pressure)

notable_level_patterns.description: Atmospheric entry with radar evasion → Run-and-gun combat through interior → Puzzle-solving sections → Control center boss fight → Energy stream chase
Bombing ship runs or glider sequences replace standard combat sections; maintains sniper utility; varies pacing significantly
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Levels featuring bombing runs or glider navigation

notable_level_patterns.description: Snowboarding sequences or unique environmental hazards integrated into Minecrawler interior; obstacle navigation + combat hybrid
Every level features completely different enemies, level design, Minecrawler aesthetic, and control center layout to maintain novelty
